commands.review_summary:
The PR backgrounds regular Codex credits and OpenAI dashboard refreshes, coalesces overlapping credits/dashboard work, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and the proposed tests: current main awaits credits and dashboard refresh work inline, while the PR’s blocking-loader tests exercise regular refresh returning before those loaders complete. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
